flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fitchburg State University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Fitchburg State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (52.7% vs 58.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fitchburg State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
